name: HYDRASCAN PRO+ 2026
shortDescription: The new generation of hydrofacial: 4K skin analysis camera, hydra-liquid system, digital client card, refreshed design. Training included in the purchase price.
description:
The HydraScan PRO+ 2026 is a premium, multifunctional hydrofacial device that combines modern hydra-liquid technology with an advanced 4K skin diagnostic system and a completely redesigned, ergonomic device housing.

This equipment is not merely a facial treatment device, but a comprehensive treatment and business development system that supports both professional work and revenue growth.

The built-in 4K diagnostic camera provides magnified, detailed images of the skin's current condition, maintains a digital client card, and supports the professional presentation of treatment packages.
metaTitle: HydraScan PRO+ 2026 | With 4K Skin Analysis, Hydra-Liquid System
metaDescription: HydraScan PRO+ 2026 hydrofacial: 4K skin analysis, hydra-liquid system, digital client card, oxy-pod treatment head. 669,990 Ft, training included in price.

paragraphs: The HydraScan PRO+ 2026 is the new generation of hydra-liquid technology, with a 4K skin diagnostic system and completely redesigned housing.
The built-in 4K camera provides magnified, detailed images of the skin's condition, maintains a digital client card, and supports sales.
The device is not merely a facial treatment device, but a comprehensive treatment and business development system – with training included in the purchase price.

features.title: 8 treatment heads for a comprehensive facial protocol

Hydrodermabrasion vacuum head (hydra-liquid)
Spray Gun (Airbrush)
Hot-Cold Hammer
Bipolar RF head
Ultrasonic head
Ultrasonic spatula (Peeling)
Oxy-pod treatment head
4K skin analysis camera

features.title: 4K Skin Intelligence – skin analysis and sales support
features.description: The built-in 4K diagnostic camera produces the highest quality images on the market of the skin's current condition. The system maintains a digital client card, archives treatment data, supports long-term treatment plan development, and aids in the professional presentation of treatment packages. The analysis function can be developed for multiple languages and customized.

features.title: New-wave hydra-liquid technology
features.description: Hydra-liquid treatment is a combination of vacuum and liquid-based deep cleansing: it deeply cleanses pores, removes sebum and impurities, supports active ingredient absorption, and provides a comfortable treatment experience. Results are immediately visible: clearer, smoother, more hydrated skin with minimal irritation.

features.title: Refreshed design and improved housing
features.description: The HydraScan PRO+ 2026 received a completely new, modern appearance. The improved housing and ergonomic interface facilitate daily work. Premium aesthetic appearance, modern clean design, improved internal system.

features.title: Training included in price – complete professional support
features.description: With the purchase of the device, you receive not just equipment but complete, structured professional support. The price includes: detailed written training materials, treatment protocols, safety guide, business and sales-oriented support, and upon request, a live model practical module.

training.headline: Training included in price – complete professional package
training.intro: With the purchase of the HydraScan PRO+ 2026, you receive not just equipment but complete, structured professional support. The goal of the training is to enable you to use the device confidently, safely, and with business effectiveness.
items: HydraScan PRO+ 2026 operating principles, treatment heads, and technologies
4K skin analysis system interpretation and practical application
Hydra-liquid treatment protocols for different skin types
Oxy-pod treatment head usage and pod set application
Client communication, digital client card, and business strategy
closingParagraphs: The training includes detailed, uniquely high-quality written materials, treatment protocols, and business-oriented support.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official certificate confirming your competence in the professional operation of the HydraScan PRO+ 2026 device.
If you'd like to see the device in person, please contact us to arrange a personal demonstration.
training.freeText: FREE – included in the purchase price!

faq.question: What's the difference between the HydraScan PRO+ 2026 and the earlier HydraScan PRO+?
faq.answer: The 2026 version is completely redesigned: 4K skin analysis micro-camera (replacing the earlier AI system), new-wave hydra-liquid technology, redesigned ergonomic housing, oxy-pod treatment head, and ultrasonic spatula. Training is included in the purchase price.

faq.question: What does the 4K skin analysis camera offer?
faq.answer: The 4K diagnostic camera provides magnified, detailed images of the skin's current condition. It maintains a digital client card, archives treatment data, supports treatment plan development, and aids in selling packages. It can be developed for multiple languages.

faq.question: What is hydra-liquid technology?
faq.answer: Hydra-liquid is a combination of vacuum and liquid-based deep cleansing. It deeply cleanses pores, removes sebum, supports active ingredient absorption, and provides a comfortable treatment experience. It often enables skipping manual extraction.

faq.question: Does the purchase price include training?
faq.answer: Yes! The device price includes complete professional training: detailed written materials, treatment protocols, safety guide, business-oriented support, and upon request, a live model practical module.

faq.question: How quickly does the HydraScan PRO+ 2026 pay for itself?
faq.answer: On average within 2-4 months, with 3-5 clients per day. 4K analysis-enhanced premium treatments can be offered at 20,000-40,000 Ft. Use our ROI calculator for exact figures!

faq.question: What skin types is it suitable for?
faq.answer: The HydraScan PRO+ 2026 is suitable for all skin types. The various treatment heads and skin analysis system enable complete treatment personalization.

faq.question: Can I view the device before purchasing?
faq.answer: Yes! You can view and try the HydraScan PRO+ 2026 in person at our showroom (Érd, Budai út 28.) by appointment.

whatsIncluded: Detailed training materials and treatment protocols
